response.justification: Candidate is a skilled full-stack software craftsman with strong web/backend experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, plus some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments. However, the role requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus, neither of which the resume demonstrates. C++ work appears limited to roughly 6 months at NI a decade ago, and there is no cloud compute platform or distributed-systems leadership experience at the scale required.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career with craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some low-latency, high-throughput backend experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Mentoring and teaching track record via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Does not meet the 8-year C++ requirement — C/C++ exposure is brief and dated (2014–2015)
No demonstrated experience leading or architecting a large-scale cloud compute platform
Lacks formal tech-lead title and production cloud architecture ownership at the required scale

key_factors.factor: No large-scale cloud compute platform experience
Strong software craftsmanship and mentoring background
